sections.name: Call of the Wild Leads To...

feat.name: Call of the Wild
feat.text: You call upon the creatures of nature to come to your aid. You can spend 10 minutes in concert with nature to replace a spell you’ve prepared in one of your druid spell slots with a summon animal or summon plant or fungus spell of the same rank.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.
